mapper.select: SELECT MAX(trade_date) FROM sector_index_daily WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND sector_type = #{sectorType}
SELECT MAX(trade_date) FROM sector_index_daily WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND sector_type = #{sectorType} AND trade_date < #{tradeDate}

SELECT cur.sector_type AS sectorType, cur.sector_code AS sectorCode, n.name AS sectorName, cur.trade_date AS tradeDate, cur.amount, cur.change_pct AS changePct, CASE WHEN prev.amount IS NOT NULL THEN cur.amount - prev.amount ELSE NULL END AS amountChange, CASE WHEN prev.change_pct IS NOT NULL THEN cur.change_pct - prev.change_pct ELSE NULL END AS changePctChange, CASE WHEN mkt.total_amount IS NOT NULL AND mkt.total_amount > 0 AND cur.amount IS NOT NULL THEN ROUND(cur.amount / mkt.total_amount * 100, 2) ELSE NULL END AS volumePct FROM sector_index_daily cur INNER JOIN
industry concept n ON cur.sector_code = n.code AND n.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sector_index_daily prev ON cur.sector_code = prev.sector_code AND prev.sector_type = #{sectorType} AND prev.trade_date = #{prevDate} AND prev.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(amount) AS total_amount FROM market_index_daily WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND trade_date = #{tradeDate} ) mkt ON 1=1 WHERE cur.sector_type = #{sectorType} AND cur.trade_date = #{tradeDate} AND cur.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY
amountChange cur.change_pct changePctChange cur.amount
ASC DESC
